currentClaim: Threadsmith Role Chain Execution Cadence v1 已 accepted：$threadsmith drive 现在要求已批准 phase 内连续执行 executor -> reviewer -> verifier -> closeout，只在真实 gate 或 closeout 后停。

doneWhenChecklist.label: 新增 Threadsmith Role Chain Execution Cadence v1 计划文档
SKILL.md drive 语义要求 phase 内 role chain 连续推进
action contract 要求 phase 间暂停而不是 role 间暂停
skill contract verifier 覆盖 role-chain cadence rule
project truth、skill contract、skill sync 与 diff hygiene 通过

knownGaps: 这轮只改 Threadsmith skill / action contract 的推进节奏语义，不改前端或自动多 agent 调度。
这仍是 skill 契约层修复，不是 runtime autopilot engine 的新实现。
